1.content:
# International Personnal Finance | Repayment Journey Dashboard

Real-time KPI monitoring, revenue insights, and operational excellence for digital credit repayment flows.

2.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | filter geo.location.latitude != null and geo.location.longitude != null | summarize count = count() by geo.location.latitude, geo.location.longitude, region

4.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | filter (in(region, $Region) or in("All", $Region) or isNull(region)) | filter (in(product, $Product) or in("All", $Product) or isNull(product)) | filter (in(channel, $Channel) or in("All", $Channel) or isNull(channel)) | filter (in(customer_segment, $Segment) or in("All", $Segment) or isNull(customer_segment)) | summarize total_revenue = sum(loan_amount) + sum(fee_amount)
4.title: Total Repayment Revenue

5.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | filter (in(region, $Region) or in("All", $Region) or isNull(region)) | filter (in(product, $Product) or in("All", $Product) or isNull(product)) | filter (in(channel, $Channel) or in("All", $Channel) or isNull(channel)) | filter (in(customer_segment, $Segment) or in("All", $Segment) or isNull(customer_segment)) | summarize successful_repayments = countIf(repayment_status == "SUCCESS"), total_repayments = count() | fields repayment_rate = successful_repayments / total_repayments * 100
5.title: Repayment Success Rate (%)

6.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | filter (in(region, $Region) or in("All", $Region) or isNull(region)) | filter (in(product, $Product) or in("All", $Product) or isNull(product)) | filter (in(channel, $Channel) or in("All", $Channel) or isNull(channel)) | filter (in(customer_segment, $Segment) or in("All", $Segment) or isNull(customer_segment)) | summarize avg_repayment_time = avg(repayment_duration)
6.title: Average Repayment Journey Time (min)

7.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | filter (in(region, $Region) or in("All", $Region) or isNull(region)) | filter (in(product, $Product) or in("All", $Product) or isNull(product)) | filter (in(channel, $Channel) or in("All", $Channel) or isNull(channel)) | filter (in(customer_segment, $Segment) or in("All", $Segment) or isNull(customer_segment)) | summarize overdue_count = countIf(repayment_status == "OVERDUE")
7.title: Overdue Repayments

8.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | filter (in(channel, $Channel) or in("All", $Channel) or isNull(channel)) | summarize count = count() by channel
8.title: Channel Distribution

9.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | filter (in(region, $Region) or in("All", $Region) or isNull(region)) | makeTimeseries count = count(), bins: 20
9.title: Repayment Volume Trend

11.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | filter (in(region, $Region) or in("All", $Region) or isNull(region)) | filter (in(product, $Product) or in("All", $Product) or isNull(product)) | filter (in(channel, $Channel) or in("All", $Channel) or isNull(channel)) | filter (in(customer_segment, $Segment) or in("All", $Segment) or isNull(customer_segment)) | summarize avg_loan_amount = avg(loan_amount)
11.title: Average Loan Amount

12.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | filter (in(region, $Region) or in("All", $Region) or isNull(region)) | summarize total_fees = sum(fee_amount)
12.title: Total Fees Collected

13.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | filter (in(product, $Product) or in("All", $Product) or isNull(product)) | summarize count = count() by product
13.title: Product Share

14.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | filter (in(region, $Region) or in("All", $Region) or isNull(region)) | makeTimeseries total_revenue = sum(loan_amount) + sum(fee_amount), bins: 20
14.title: Revenue Trend

15.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | summarize count = count() by region | sort count desc | limit 10
15.title: Top Regions by Repayment Volume

17.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | summarize avg_processing_time = avg(processing_duration)
17.title: Avg Processing Duration (min)

18.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | summarize failed_repayments = countIf(repayment_status == "FAILED")
18.title: Failed Repayments

19.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | makeTimeseries avg_processing_time = avg(processing_duration), bins: 20
19.title: Processing Duration Trend

20.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | summarize count = count() by repayment_method
20.title: Repayment Method Distribution

21.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | makeTimeseries failed_repayments = countIf(repayment_status == "FAILED"), bins: 20
21.title: Failed Repayments Trend

23.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | summarize avg_app_to_repay_time = avg(application_to_repayment_duration)
23.title: Avg Time: Application to Repayment (min)

24.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | summarize count = count() by customer_segment
24.title: Customer Segment Distribution

25.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | makeTimeseries avg_app_to_repay_time = avg(application_to_repayment_duration), bins: 20
25.title: Journey Duration Trend

26.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | summarize count = count() by touchpoint
26.title: Touchpoint Distribution

27.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | summarize count = count() by customer_segment | sort count desc | limit 10
27.title: Top Customer Segments

29.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | summarize count = countIf(quality_flag == "PASS")
29.title: Quality Pass Count

30.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | summarize count = countIf(quality_flag == "FAIL")
30.title: Quality Fail Count

31.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | makeTimeseries quality_pass = countIf(quality_flag == "PASS"), quality_fail = countIf(quality_flag == "FAIL"), bins: 20
31.title: Quality Trend

32.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | summarize count = count() by compliance_status
32.title: Compliance Status Distribution

33.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | makeTimeseries compliance_fail = countIf(compliance_status == "FAIL"), bins: 20
33.title: Compliance Failures Trend

34.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | summarize count = count() by ancillary_product
34.title: Ancillary Product Share

35.query: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | filter compliance_status == "FAIL" | fields loan_id, customer_id, compliance_issue, region, product | limit 20
35.title: Compliance Failures (Detail)

variables.name: Journey Type
variables.input: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | fields json.journeyType | filter isNotNull(json.journeyType)| dedup json.journeyType

variables.name: Region
variables.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.provider == "internationalpersonnalfinance.event.provider" | dedup region | fields region
variables.input: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | dedup region | fields region

variables.name: Product
variables.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.provider == "internationalpersonnalfinance.event.provider" | dedup product | fields product
variables.input: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | dedup product | fields product

variables.name: Channel
variables.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.provider == "internationalpersonnalfinance.event.provider" | dedup channel | fields channel
variables.input: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | dedup channel | fields channel

variables.name: Segment
variables.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.provider == "internationalpersonnalfinance.event.provider" | dedup customer_segment | fields customer_segment
variables.input: fetch bizevents | filter json.companyName == $EventProvider | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | dedup customer_segment | fields customer_segment
